classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域为输入端法兰正视尺寸图，包含外形轮廓、中心孔、安装孔分布及尺寸标注，如'输入Input'、'□C7'、'ΦC1'、'4-C2'和两个'45°'角度标注，体现机械安装与几何尺寸信息。

text_annotations.correction_note: Merged square symbol and C7; discarded overlapping duplicate ocr_004.
Normalized diameter symbol from ∅ to Φ.

terminology_notes: C1, C2 and C7 are parameter codes whose numeric values are not shown in the target crop.

dimension_records.reason: Visible text labels the input side of the mechanical interface, not a numeric dimension.
Square symbol followed by C7 is attached to the top horizontal dimension spanning the square housing width.
Angular callout on the right side marks the upper 45 degree mounting/corner orientation.
Separate angular callout on the right side marks the lower 45 degree mounting/corner orientation.

dimension_records.parameter_en: Mounting hole pitch circle diameter C1
dimension_records.reason: Diameter callout with leader points to the circular mounting pattern, indicating pitch circle or circular feature diameter C1.

dimension_records.parameter_en: Four C2 holes or mounting features
dimension_records.reason: Leader points to repeated corner mounting features and the callout specifies four instances of C2.

frontend_table_records.parameter: Mounting hole pitch circle diameter C1
Four C2 holes or mounting features

audit_table_records.parameter_en: Mounting hole pitch circle diameter C1
Four C2 holes or mounting features

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Input-side square flange with square envelope C7, diameter-related mounting pattern C1, four C2 mounting features, and two 45° angular callouts.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Not specified in OCR-visible text for this crop.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Square outer envelope marked □C7; numeric value not visible in the target crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Numeric dimensional table values for C1, C2 and C7 are not visible in the target crop.

unresolved_items.issue: Low-confidence isolated '1' appears to be line or geometry noise rather than a valid text callout.
unresolved_items.suggested_action: Discard from final annotations unless manually verified.

unresolved_items.issue: Overlaps the merged □C7 callout and duplicates only the C7 portion without preserving the square symbol.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Input/left mounting interface includes C8, C6, C4, ΦC5G6, and ΦC3G6 symbolic parameters; numeric table values are not visible in the target crop.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Output shaft interface includes L5, L6, ΦD3h6, ΦD4h6, ΦD7, and ΦD6 symbolic parameters; numeric values are not visible.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Overall axial envelope is represented by C9; output-side diameter envelope includes ΦD6 and ΦD7.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: No connector-related annotation is visible in the target crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Dimensional table values for all symbolic parameters are Not specified in the provided target crop.

Partial duplicate of higher-confidence full callout ΦD4h6.

Duplicate/partial overlap of higher-utility ΦC3G6 annotation.
Conflicts with and overlaps the ΦC3G6 callout; treated as spurious OCR.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是标注为'输出 Output'的端面结构视图，包含同心圆轮廓、安装孔、中心线、引出线和尺寸标注'D2深(depth)L7'、'ΦD1'、'90°'，表达输出端法兰和孔位尺寸关系，属于机械结构尺寸图。

dimension_records.reason: Text is a view/side label identifying the output side, not a numeric dimension.
Leader arrow points to a circular hole on the output flange; D2 and depth L7 form one hole specification.
Angular dimension arc indicates the circumferential spacing between repeated mounting holes.
Diameter callout points to the circular bolt pattern reference on the output flange.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Output flange mounting interface includes hole specification D2 depth L7, pitch circle diameter ΦD1, and 90° angular spacing.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Central output shaft/interface geometry is shown but no OCR text callout is available in this crop.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: No overall envelope dimensions are OCR-detected in this crop.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: No connector annotation is present in this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Symbolic dimensions D1, D2, and L7 are shown without numeric values.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为尺寸图中的局部机械结构，显示圆形孔位、键槽/槽口轮廓、中心线、引出线和尺寸标注'B1h9'、'D5深(depth)L9'、'H1'，用于表达零部件局部外形与孔深尺寸，不包含针脚功能或性能曲线。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
